response: Hey everyone! I'm Logan — I like to dive into things headfirst and I'm not afraid to speak my mind, so expect me to be pretty active in our chats. I'm all about trusting the process, but I'll definitely push back if something feels off.

Hey everyone, Kennedy here! I'm pretty straightforward and I like to keep things moving — I'd rather speak up and figure things out together than sit back and overthink everything. You'll hear from me plenty, and I'm not afraid to call out stuff that doesn't add up.

Hey everyone, I'm Casey! I tend to approach things pretty calmly and methodically, so I'll be listening closely before drawing conclusions. I trust the group to work together fairly, and I'll support decisions that feel well thought out.

Hey everyone, I'm Jordan. I tend to be pretty methodical and like to look at things carefully before making a call—I'd rather collect all the info first than rush into a decision. I'll speak up when I see something worth discussing, but I'm happy to let the conversation play out fairly.

Hey everyone, I'm Finley. I tend to be a bit quiet and anxious in group settings, so I'll probably listen more than I speak—but I'll speak up if something really bothers me. I just want to make sure we think things through carefully before rushing into anything.

Alright, let's break this down. Gray is loud and gut-driven, which could make them unpredictable and dangerous if they start sniffing in the wrong direction. Bailey and Casey are playing it methodical and cooperative, which often signals a careful player who might be the Doctor trying to blend in by being agreeable. Let's take out Casey—quiet, logical types can quietly figure things out without drawing heat, and that's bad for us.
